prompt: A photorealistic selfie of a young man with short wavy dark hair and light stubble on an indoor basketball court. He wears a black athletic t-shirt with a white swoosh. He holds a {argument name="ball color" default="green"} basketball featuring a large white {argument name="logo design" default="OpenAI logo"}. The background shows a hardwood floor, black wall pads, and a basketball hoop against a concrete wall. Bright indoor gym lighting with a casual social media aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张年轻男子的写实风格自拍，他留着深色短卷发，留着浅浅的胡茬，身处室内篮球场。他穿着一件带有白色耐克勾标志的黑色运动 T 恤。他手中拿着一个 {argument name="ball color" default="绿色"} 篮球，上面印有一个醒目的白色 {argument name="logo design" default="OpenAI logo"}。背景展示了硬木地板、黑色墙垫以及混凝土墙上的篮球架。明亮的室内健身房灯光，呈现出休闲的社交媒体美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 定制 Logo 篮球自拍：生成一张年轻男子在室内球场手持带有特定 Logo 的定制配色篮球的写实风格自拍。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
